query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'processos_trabalhistas' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%valor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%pago%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%status%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%fase%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%numero%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'processos_trabalhistas' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%valor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%pago%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%status%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%fase%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%numero%');
stdout:

numeroProcesso
